scripts.install-all: npm install && cd api-gateway && npm install && cd ../auth-service && npm install && cd ../user-service && npm install && cd ../station-service && npm install && cd ../recommendation-service && npm install
scripts.start-all: concurrently "cd api-gateway && npm start" "cd auth-service && npm start" "cd user-service && npm start" "cd station-service && npm start" "cd recommendation-service && npm start"
